ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>The response is contextually relevant and natural but lacks a bit of the caring persona expected from a Village Healer, especially in an infirmary setting.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>3<TAB>Adequate response with some context relevance but could be more personalized and natural to the persona of a Village Healer, especially considering their current duty in researching.

A response that is somewhat relevant and consistent with a calm healer persona but lacks specificity in addressing dizziness symptoms, which affects naturalness. The overall quality could be improved by providing more immediate advice tailored to the situation at hand.
